glosses.vi: công trường; công trường xây dựng
glosses.ja: 建設現場; 工事現場

sentences.target: On passe devant le chantier chaque matin.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pas dəvɑ̃ lə ʃɑ̃tje ʃak matɛ̃/

translations.fr: On passe devant le chantier chaque matin.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pas dəvɑ̃ lə ʃɑ̃tje ʃak matɛ̃/
translations.en: We go past the construction site every morning.
translations.es: Pasamos por delante de la obra cada mañana.
translations.de: Wir gehen jeden Morgen an der Baustelle vorbei.
translations.it: Passiamo davanti al cantiere ogni mattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们每天早上都会经过工地。
translations.yue: 我哋每日朝早都會經過地盤。
translations.ru: Мы каждое утро проходим мимо стройки.
translations.pt: Passamos pelo canteiro de obras todas as manhãs.
translations.he: אנחנו עוברים ליד אתר הבנייה כל בוקר.
translations.vi: Mỗi sáng chúng tôi đi ngang qua công trình xây dựng.
translations.ar: نمر بجانب موقع البناء كل صباح.
translations.nl: We lopen elke ochtend langs de bouwplaats.
translations.uk: Ми щоранку проходимо повз будівельний майданчик.
translations.hu: Minden reggel elmegyünk az építkezés mellett.
translations.hi: हम हर सुबह निर्माण स्थल के पास से गुजरते हैं।
translations.pl: Każdego ranka przechodzimy obok placu budowy.
translations.el: Περνάμε μπροστά από το εργοτάξιο κάθε πρωί.
translations.nb: Vi går forbi byggeplassen hver morgen.
translations.id: Setiap pagi kami lewat di depan lokasi konstruksi.
translations.sv: Vi går förbi byggarbetsplatsen varje morgon.
translations.ro: Trecem pe lângă șantier în fiecare dimineață.
translations.da: Vi går forbi byggepladsen hver morgen.
translations.ja: 毎朝、工事現場の前を通ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject impersonal pronoun; here used as the sentence subject meaning generic ‘we/one’.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular, agreeing with ‘On’.
Preposition introducing the spatial PP ‘devant le chantier’.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiners ‘chantier’.
Head noun of the NP complement to ‘devant’ (location).
Distributive determiner modifying ‘matin’, expressing frequency.
Temporal noun; ‘chaque matin’ functions as an adverbial time/frequency phrase.

sentences.target: Tu entends le bruit du chantier.

translations.fr: Tu entends le bruit du chantier.
translations.en: You hear the noise from the construction site.
translations.es: Oyes el ruido de la obra.
translations.de: Du hörst den Lärm von der Baustelle.
translations.pt: Você ouve o barulho do canteiro de obras.
translations.he: אתה שומע את הרעש מאתר הבנייה.
translations.vi: Bạn nghe tiếng ồn từ công trình xây dựng.
translations.nl: Je hoort het lawaai van de bouwplaats.
translations.hi: तुम निर्माण स्थल से आने वाला शोर सुनते हो।
translations.el: Ακούς τον θόρυβο από το εργοτάξιο.
translations.id: Kamu mendengar kebisingan dari lokasi konstruksi.
translations.ja: 工事現場の騒音が聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular, agreeing with ‘Tu’.
Definite article determining ‘bruit’.
Head noun; direct object of ‘entends’.
Preposition ‘de’ contracted with ‘le’; introduces the nominal complement ‘chantier’ (source/genitive).
Noun complement to ‘du’, specifying the origin of the noise.

sentences.target: Nous travaillons sur un chantier en ville.
sentences.reading: /nu tʁavajɔ̃ syʁ œ̃ ʃɑ̃tje ɑ̃ vil/

translations.fr: Nous travaillons sur un chantier en ville.
translations.ipa: /nu tʁavajɔ̃ syʁ œ̃ ʃɑ̃tje ɑ̃ vil/
translations.en: We work on a construction site in town.
translations.es: Trabajamos en una obra en la ciudad.
translations.de: Wir arbeiten auf einer Baustelle in der Stadt.
translations.it: Lavoriamo in un cantiere in città.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在城里的工地工作。
translations.yue: 我哋喺市區嘅地盤做嘢。
translations.ru: Мы работаем на стройке в городе.
translations.pt: Trabalhamos em um canteiro de obras na cidade.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi làm việc tại một công trình xây dựng trong thành phố.
translations.ar: نحن نعمل في موقع بناء داخل المدينة.
translations.nl: We werken op een bouwplaats in de stad.
translations.uk: Ми працюємо на будівельному майданчику в місті.
translations.hi: हम शहर में एक निर्माण स्थल पर काम करते हैं।
translations.pl: Pracujemy na placu budowy w mieście.
translations.nb: Vi jobber på en byggeplass i byen.
translations.id: Kami bekerja di sebuah lokasi konstruksi di kota.
translations.sv: Vi arbetar på en byggarbetsplats i staden.
translations.ro: Lucrăm pe un șantier în oraș.
translations.da: Vi arbejder på en byggeplads i byen.
translations.ja: 私たちは街の工事現場で働いています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural.
Preposition introducing the PP ‘sur un chantier’ (location).
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘chantier’.
Head noun of the NP complement to ‘sur’.
Preposition introducing the locative PP ‘en ville’.
Head noun in the PP ‘en ville’, indicating place.

sentences.target: La route est bloquée par le chantier.
sentences.reading: /la ʁut ɛ blɔke paʁ lə ʃɑ̃tje/

translations.fr: La route est bloquée par le chantier.
translations.ipa: /la ʁut ɛ blɔke paʁ lə ʃɑ̃tje/
translations.en: The road is blocked by the construction site.
translations.es: La carretera está bloqueada por la obra.
translations.de: Die Straße ist wegen der Baustelle gesperrt.
translations.it: La strada è bloccata dal cantiere.
translations.pt: A estrada está bloqueada por causa da obra.
translations.vi: Con đường bị chặn bởi công trình xây dựng.
translations.nl: De weg is afgesloten vanwege de bouwplaats.
translations.hu: Az út le van zárva az építkezés miatt.
translations.hi: निर्माण स्थल के कारण सड़क बंद है।
translations.pl: Droga jest zablokowana z powodu budowy.
translations.el: Ο δρόμος είναι κλειστός λόγω του εργοταξίου.
translations.nb: Veien er stengt på grunn av byggeplassen.
translations.sv: Vägen är avstängd på grund av byggarbetsplatsen.
translations.ro: Drumul este blocat din cauza șantierului.
translations.da: Vejen er spærret på grund af byggepladsen.
translations.ja: 道路は工事現場のため通行止めです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘route’.
Subject noun of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (present indicative, 3rd person singular) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Past participle used as predicate adjective; feminine singular agreeing with ‘route’.
Preposition introducing the agent/cause in a passive-like construction.
Definite article determining ‘chantier’.
Noun complement to ‘par’, denoting the entity causing the blockage.
